title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oil India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Oil India:
Oil India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India!
